mapper.select: SELECT st.id as id, st.customer_id as customerId, st.order_id as orderId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_agent_id as assignedAgentId, st.description as description, st.resolved_at as resolvedAt, st.reopen_count as reopenCount, st.created_at as createdAt FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.id = #{id}
SELECT st.state_id as stateId, COUNT(*) as ticketCount FROM support_tickets st GROUP BY st.state_id

SELECT st.id as id, st.customer_id as customerId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_agent_id as assignedAgentId, st.created_at as createdAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, st.created_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) as hoursOpen FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, st.created_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) > COALESCE(#{slaHours}, 24) ORDER BY st.created_at ASC ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, st.created_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) > COALESCE(#{slaHours}, 24)

SELECT st.id as id, st.customer_id as customerId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_agent_id as assignedAgentId, st.created_at as createdAt FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.assigned_agent_id = #{assignedAgentId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT st.id as id, st.customer_id as customerId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_agent_id as assignedAgentId, st.created_at as createdAt FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.priority = #{priority} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT st.id as id, st.customer_id as customerId, st.order_id as orderId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_agent_id as assignedAgentId, st.resolved_at as resolvedAt, st.created_at as createdAt FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
